goal: pair_distance[P, Q](pair_map[M, N, P, Q](f, g, p), pair_map[M, N, P, Q](f, g, q)) = pair_distance[P, Q](fp, fq)
pair_distance[P, Q](pair_map[M, N, P, Q](f, g, p), pair_map[M, N, P, Q](f, g, q)) <= r
pair_map_components_nonexpansive[M, N, P, Q](f, g) = (forall(x0: M, x1: M) { f(x0).distance(f(x1)) <= x0.distance(x1) } and forall(x2: N, x3: N) { g(x2).distance(g(x3)) <= x2.distance(x3) })
proof: function[T0: MetricSpace, T1: MetricSpace, T3: MetricSpace, T4: MetricSpace](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T3 -> T4) { (forall(x2: T0, x3: T0) { x0(x2).distance(x0(x3)) <= x2.distance(x3) } and forall(x4: T3, x5: T3) { x1(x4).distance(x1(x5)) <= x4.distance(x5) }) = pair_map_components_nonexpansive[T0, T3, T1, T4](x0, x1) }[M, P, N, Q](f, g)

goal: forall(x0: M, x1: M) { f(x0).distance(f(x1)) <= x0.distance(x1) }

proof: function(x0: M, x1: M) { f(x0).distance(f(x1)) <= x0.distance(x1) }(p.first, q.first)

goal: forall(x0: N, x1: N) { g(x0).distance(g(x1)) <= x0.distance(x1) }

proof: function(x0: N, x1: N) { g(x0).distance(g(x1)) <= x0.distance(x1) }(p.second, q.second)

goal: pair_distance[P, Q](pair_map[M, N, P, Q](f, g, p), pair_map[M, N, P, Q](f, g, q)) <= pair_distance[M, N](p, q)

proof: function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 > x1 = x1 < x0 }[Real](0, a)

function[T0: MetricSpace](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0.distance(x1) <= x0.distance(x2) + x2.distance(x1) }[N](p2, r2, q2)
